name: EditorConfig Language Service
description: Language support for .editorconfig files

name: File Icons
description: Adds icons for files that are not recognized by Solution Explorer

name: Markdown Editor
description: A full featured Markdown editor with live preview and syntax highlighting

name: Solution Favorites
description: Quick access to favorite files and folders in any solution

name: Git Diff Margin
description: Displays live Git changes in the editor margin and scrollbar

name: Image Optimizer
description: Compresses images directly in Solution Explorer

name: VsVim
description: Vim emulation layer for Visual Studio

name: .github + MCP
description: Adds a GitHub node to Solution Explorer that displays the contents of your repository's .github folder and MCP servers

name: File Explorer
description: Gives access to all files and folders from the file system under the repo or solution root folder in Solution Explorer

name: Markdown Lint
description: Real-time Markdown linting with warnings and errors based on markdownlint rules

name: VS Pets
description: Animated pets that walk along the Visual Studio status bar and react to builds

name: CSV Editor
description: Full-featured CSV/TSV editor with table view, navigation, and highlighting

name: SQL Formatter
description: Adds support for the Format Document command for SQL files

name: Document Health
description: Shows inline diagnostics, margin glyphs, and document health status icon

name: SQLite / SQL Server Compact Toolbox
description: Explore, script, query, and manage SQLite and SQL Server Compact databases

name: Output Enhancer
description: Adds color highlighting and styling to the Output window and Build results

name: Blue Steel Theme Pack
description: Collection of beautiful light, dark, and solarized themes for Visual Studio 2026

name: Solution Colors
description: Color code solutions and folders to easily distinguish between multiple open instances

name: TOML Editor
description: First-class TOML support with syntax highlighting, validation, outlining, and IntelliSense

name: SVG Viewer
description: Live SVG preview, IntelliSense, and custom file icons for easier SVG editing

name: Insert Guid
description: Quickly insert a new GUID into any editor or input field with a keyboard shortcut
